Nyonya chef, Belinda pawns a vintage Nyonya pin that represents a vow of singlehood that her best friend Adele and she have taken. However, that vow is broken when Adele decides to get married...

Belinda exposes Adele for not loving Coby at all, but Adele claims that it is Belinda who has broken the vow first...

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 305
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 271
programme.desc: High Strength Activated Ginkgo to Boost Your Mind and Circulation 125mg of Activated Ginkgo Biloba enhanced with Japanese Activated Technology for better absorption. It helps to boost blood circulation and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve health conditions caused by poor blood circulation.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 234
programme.desc: 14-in-1 La Gourmet pressure cooker that cooks food quickly using steam pressure La Gourmet glass air fryer cooks food by circulating hot air to produce crispy and healthier meals.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100 natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 241
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body's immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism.

programme.title: Come Sing With Me S5 - EP 10
programme.desc: The programme continues to improve and entertain the viewers when singers sing together with the audiences, filfilling the dreams of many ordinary peoplke who dreamt of singing together with their idols. Featured singers include Richie Jen, Nicky Lee, Li Yu Chun, Jordon Chan etc.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 295
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung’s health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Hush Little Baby
programme.desc: After a lantern parade, two-year-old Paulina is found missing from her room. The chilling kidnapping hurls Investigator Martin Bruhl back into a sleepless nightmare he experienced two years ago.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (2)
programme.desc: After returning to her parents’ hotel in Barcelona, Laura spends a romantic night with deputy manager Mateo. Though drawn to him, she must stay professional - especially as her troubled son Pedro drifts further away and family conflicts resurface.

programme.title: Adventures In The Land Of Asha
programme.desc: After 9-year-old Jules is banned from school because of his rare skin disease, his greatest wish is to be cured. He meets a mysterious new friend, Asha, after his dog runs away into the forest. Together, they go on an adventure to find a cure for him.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: Sima's Song
programme.desc: In 1970s Afghanistan, best friends Suraya and Sima are torn apart by political upheaval. Suraya is a wealthy communist and Sima is a traditional singer, and though their paths diverge, their enduring bond proves stronger than ideology.

programme.title: Temporaries
programme.desc: Ariane gets a job as an interpreter at a food plant after moving back to the Richelieu Valley following a breakup. There, she finds herself torn between obeying the harsh demands of her boss and standing up for the exploited migrant workers she befriends.

programme.title: Silent Screams
programme.desc: A young doctor is confronted with bad cases of abused children. She is shocked at how complicated it is to hold parents accountable. When a baby is killed, she decides to take a more active role, risking her medical license and her own life.

programme.title: Murders in Amboise
programme.desc: When a violinist is found murdered near da Vinci’s tomb in a pose similar to The Vitruvian Man, Captain Alban Dutertre returns home to investigate. As more da Vinci-inspired killings follow, he and Bérénice Amarillo link this to a missing young artist.

programme.title: Timeline
programme.desc: A romantic reunion turns into a life-or-death game of secrets and survival, where the past cannot stay hidden.

programme.title: Particles
programme.desc: As winter sets in and P.A. sees the world shifting around him, he starts to observe strange phenomena in the environment. The changes are imperceptible at first, but gradually his whole world seems to be on the brink.

programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Aoi is an underage mother struggling to make ends meet and dealing with her husband’s violent temper. After her husband loses his job, their continuous fights lead them to a social downfall.

programme.desc: In contemporary Istanbul, four youths in their twenties find themselves brought together by chance. Restless, disillusioned, and searching for direction, the four characters go face to face with the anxieties of their generation.

programme.title: Zero to Millionaire
programme.desc: Ahmad, Hamid and Mahmud (Mad, Mid, Mud) are three brothers who work as car washers. One time a customer accused them of scratching his car. Mad denied and acted aggressively on the customer. As a result, Mad, Mid and Mud were arrested and charged. Suddenly they were guaranteed by an entrepreneur named Tuan Abu. In order to avoid further prosecution, Tuan Abu requires Mad, Mid and Mud to work in his old people's welfare home.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 31
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: From KL to PL - EP 1
programme.desc: 4 personalities from 4 different backgrounds embark on a journey in the United Kingdom on a mission to explore the Premier League's leading stadiums. A vacation that is supposed to be fun but there are tasks that need to be completed.

programme.title: Susu Lima Kupang
programme.desc: This story centers on Zakaria, a nine-year-old boy living in poverty with his autistic mother and grandmother. Isolated and bullied for being fatherless, Zakaria finds solace in his friendship with a goat he lovingly names Maryam. When Maryam accidentally breaks his mother’s cherished radio, causing her emotional distress, Zakaria is determined to make things right.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 9
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 29
programme.desc: After being released from lock up, Farouk vows revenge on Qaisara and Azizi. Karmilla suspects Farouk may be the son she gave away and Zul returns to the city to find their home sold, the café lost and Azizi fired from his job.

programme.desc: Nadia introduces her bridesmaids to Ashraf and in come Jen, Nadia's cousin. The one who Ashraf ghosted 16 years ago. Zainab hired a private investigator as she suspects that Mazlan is having an affair. A renowned food reviewer is coming to check on The Nom Nom Boys. As they were helping out the wedding prep, Ashraf and Jen seems to hit it off... wrongly.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 8
programme.desc: Martha tries to convince J.P not to get married to Nadia. Zainab follows Mazlan discreetly and find out the truth. Sally reveals to Bob that she is pregnant.. much to the delight of Bob and the dismay of Sally. Seeing Ashraf and Jen happy with one another makes Nadia have doubts if she has feelings towards Ashraf in the first place. To make matters worse, Martha came to see Ashraf and tell him something that can ruin the wedding.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 9
programme.desc: Bob is oblivious that J.P is sending him to Bangkok for an urgent client presentation. Zainab met her ex crush back in secondary school, Zack, and got smitten by him. J.P is asking for Ashraf's help as he loses his card. Jen organised a Bachelorette Party and discovers that Nadia might have feelings towards Ashraf. J.P came back home and someone from the past is waiting for him, Sherilyn!

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 10
programme.desc: It's the eve of the wedding and the caterer goes missing! Not just the caterer but J.P goes missing as well and Ashraf feels he knows why. Bob is extremely frustrated that Sally didn't spend time with him to resolve their differences. Mazlan finally opens up about Yanni to Zainab. After almost 17 years, Ashraf did what he failed countless times to do before.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 11
programme.desc: The year is 2007. Before Nadia, there was this girl in the school by the name of Shayla Anggulia who Ashraf had a big crush on. Bob, an avid basketball player back then, likes to chat on the internet and happens to be in touch with a girl known as Naddy143. When Bob finally wants to meet Naddy143, he asked Ashraf to accompany him. That is when Ashraf met Nadia... AKA Naddy143 for the first time.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 12
programme.desc: The wedding day. Ashraf and Nadia realised that J.P goes missing (again!) after the incident last night. Something happened to Sally as she and Bob were searching for J.P. Mazlan tried to teach Zainab how to cycle but it's not easy as it seems. An unexpected assistance from someone led Ashraf and Nadia to J.P.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 13
programme.desc: Nadia, J.P and Ashraf arrived just in time for the solemnisation. After the mishap, Sally is determined to attend the wedding. Nadia and J.P finally weds and Ashraf disappeared just before the wedding is over, much to the dismay of Nadia. After one year of moving away and not contacting, Ashraf comes back and finally meet his friends. And Nadia.

programme.desc: JMJ Magika Raya follows Ayla on a magical journey exploring heritage and the spirit of Hari Raya. One day, Ayla quarrels with her mum and falls asleep while clutching a folklore book. In a dreamlike world, she meets legendary Malay icons such as Hang Nadim, Radin Mas and Badang. Through these encounters, Ayla learns that the true spirit of Raya lies in forgiveness, gratitude, love and togetherness.

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Thirunaal Thiruvizha - EP 7

Soulful musical performances set the festive mood and a lively gossip segment dishes out the latest in Tamil cinema and Vasantham programs. Get ready to celebrate our festivals like never before!
